name: Cheddar Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt together into a bowl.
2. Mix in the grated cheddar cheese.
3. Cut the butter into the dry ingredients until well combined.
4. Gradually add the milk and mix quickly but thoroughly. The dough should be soft.
5. Turn out onto a floured board and knead lightly for a few seconds.
6. Pat to a thickness of 3/8 inch.
7. Cut into portions and place on a baking sheet.
8. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) about 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Serve hot.
